name: lumen-translation
description: Lumen Translation — an MIT/Apache-2.0 open-source bilingual translation product matrix covering FluentRead / Kiss Translator / Immersive Translate.

scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter "./packages/**" build && pnpm --filter "@lumen/extension" build && pnpm --filter "@lumen/userscript" build && pnpm --filter "@lumen/popclip" build
